case_title: CINGOLANI, ALBERT VS WOLVERTON, WILLIAM S.

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF NOV-15-2005, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,451.50 FILED BY CINGOLANI, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT WOLVERTON, WILLIAM S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CINGOLANI, ALBERT HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ALBERT CINGOLANI'S 3/1/06 TO THE COURT FILED.
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED;TO:FOLDER,SUP. MAILED COPIES TO PARTIES.
NOTICE OF ORDER SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CINGOLANI, ALBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOLVERTON, WILLIAM S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COURT'S RESPONSE TO ALBERT CINGOLANI'S MARCH 1, 2006 LETTER.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT RETURNED WITH COMMENTS FROM PARTY-LACKS DUE PROCESS. PARTY NOT ENGAGED IN COMMERCE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION CONTINUED FROM OCT-19-2005 TO NOV-15-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO 10/19/05 AT 3:30PM. THE PLTF CITES AUTHORITIES FROM FEDERAL LAW AND THE DEFT CITED AUTHORITY FROM
FROM STATE LAW. PLEASE BRING EVIDENCE INDICATING WHETHER THEY MONEY WAS TRANSFERRED IN RESPONSE TO THE CA FRANCHISE TAX BOARD
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WOLVERTON, WILLIAM S.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CINGOLANI, ALBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOLVERTON, WILLIAM S. PER CAL REV AND TAX CODE SECTION 18674, WITHHOLD AGENT, MUST PAY WITHOUT RESULTING TO ACTION (A) STATES IN PART:".. ANY EMPLOYER OR PERSON PAYING TO THE FRANCHISE TAX BOARD ANY AMOUNT REQUIRED BY IT TO BE WITHHELD IS NOT LIABLE THEREFORE TO THE PERSON FROM WHOM WITHHELD UNLESS THE AMOUNT IS REFUNDED TO THE WITHHOLDING AGENT." STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OR THE UNITED STATES INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE.
